records.original_text: Long time Spotify premium subsriber. Everything is great except the AI DJ. Its super annoying always plays the same songs instead of at least playing some other songs from the same artist. You could do much better!
records.cleaned_text: Long time Spotify premium subsriber. Everything is great except the AI DJ. Its super annoying always plays the same songs instead of at least playing some other songs from the same artist. You could do much better!
records.insight: User is experiencing high repetition and loops when playing playlists or using smart shuffle.

records.original_text: Can’t make it stop. If you ever listen to a podcast etc, and decide you don’t like it- it will play it up next for the rest of your life. There is no way to make it stop automatically playing or suggest it less. Either that, or it will restart a podcast you have already finished- I know you just listened to that 15 minutes ago, maybe you want to hear it again??
records.cleaned_text: Can’t make it stop. If you ever listen to a podcast etc, and decide you don’t like it- it will play it up next for the rest of your life. There is no way to make it stop automatically playing or suggest it less. Either that, or it will restart a podcast you have already finished- I know you just listened to that 15 minutes ago, maybe you want to hear it again??
records.insight: User finds the user interface (search, home screen) too cluttered, especially with podcasts, hindering music discovery.

records.original_text: shame on you. This app has been so bad recently. and modified my playlist so i will cancel this suscription.     Bye

records.original_text: I ❤️ Spotify. Spotify has helped me through so much it may seem overdramatic but it has every song you can think of and that is something that k think everyone can love. It has a whole bunch of songs like a whole bunch and it is a great music app. Spotify is the only app I’ve used for music I’ve never used any other app because Spotify has caught my full attention. You can add as many songs as you want to one playlist but you can make multiple playlists and you can also use ai to make a playlist which is great because if you don’t know some songs Spotify has got your back. I most definitely recommend Spotify.
records.cleaned_text: I ❤️ Spotify. Spotify has helped me through so much it may seem overdramatic but it has every song you can think of and that is something that k think everyone can love. It has a whole bunch of songs like a whole bunch and it is a great music app. Spotify is the only app I’ve used for music I’ve never used any other app because Spotify has caught my full attention. You can add as many songs as you want to one playlist but you can make multiple playlists and you can also use ai to make a playlist which is great because if you don’t know some songs Spotify has got your back. I most definitely recommend Spotify.
records.insight: User mentions a gap or missing discovery feature in the application.

records.original_text: Stuck on smart shuffle. I have an old phone that doesn’t update very well so that might be a factor, but my Spotify is stuck on smart shuffle and it says I need to buy premium to turn off and put it back to normal or just on normal shuffle. My iPad is different though and it says I have to pay for things like smart shuffle, and I don’t understand why it’s doing that on my phone. I’ve checked and it doesn’t say I have to update it or anything, it just doesn’t work right for me on my phone and I don’t understand why.

I’ve checked and it doesn’t say I have to update it or anything, it just doesn’t work right for me on my phone and I don’t understand why.

records.original_text: The only let down. I try to listen to many podcasts on Spotify but the only let down with this app is the timer… you need to add a feature where you can either edit your own timer time or make your options wider. I need more than one hour or end of the episode. This adjustment would make it 5 star and make my use increase

records.original_text: Premium?!. Keep asking me to pay for premium but ads don’t come off podcasts - the podcasters themselves have adverts, that’s fine, I expect it, Spotify then telling me there’s a podcast about the British monarchy that even listeners of it don’t rate 5 stars themselves doesn’t feel like “ad free” listening to me
